g.text: Fig. 2 | Vertical evidence readiness is a screening gate

text.style: font-size: 8.7px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #26343f

g.text: The central mechanism is a supply-demand mismatch: two-dimensional building maps scale globally, while task-ready vertical evidence remains source-bound.
